svg.text: A Payments foundations · 4 topics · Wks 1–2
A1 · The four-party model (Visa, issuer, acquirer, merchant)
A2 · Auth, clearing & settlement — how a transaction completes
A3 · Payment rails landscape (card, ACH, RTP, wire, SWIFT)
A4 · Cross-border payments & FX mechanics
B Economics & network dynamics · 4 topics · Wks 3–4
B1 · Interchange economics — who pays, who benefits, why it exists
B2 · Issuer & acquirer P&L — how banks and processors make money
B3 · Merchant economics — acceptance cost, steering, negotiation
B4 · Visa's revenue model — how the network earns (service fees, DI, other)
C Acceptance & merchant side · 4 topics · Wks 5–6
C1 · Acquirers & PSPs — who they are, how they compete
C2 · POS, gateways & orchestration — the merchant tech stack
C3 · Online vs in-store acceptance — different economics, different fraud
C4 · Platform & embedded payments (Stripe, Adyen, Shopify)
D Consumer products · 4 topics · Wks 7–8
D1 · Card products — debit, credit, prepaid, commercial
D2 · Digital wallets & tokenization (VTS, Apple Pay, Google Pay)
D3 · Authentication & security (3DS, biometrics, FIDO)
D4 · UX innovation — Tap to Pay, Visa Pay, Flex Credential
E Commercial & money movement (CMS) · 4 topics · Wks 9–10
E1 · B2B payments — the problem, the opportunity, Visa's play
E2 · Visa Direct & push payments — real-time money movement
E3 · Commercial cards & corporate solutions
E4 · Cross-border money movement & Visa Cross-Border Solutions
F Value added services (VAS) · 5 topics · Wks 11–13
F1 · Risk & fraud — CyberSource, Visa Protect, AI-driven decisioning
F2 · Data & analytics — Visa's data moat and monetisation
F3 · Issuing & processing solutions (Pismo, DPS)
F4 · Acceptance & merchant solutions — Visa Accept, acquiring tools
F5 · Consulting & advisory — Visa Consulting & Analytics (VCA)
G Threats to the model · 6 topics · Wks 14–16
G1 · Rails competition — RTP/A2A, Pix, UPI, the McKinsey yield shift
G2 · Disintermediation — wallets, super-apps, embedded finance
G3 · Economics pressure — interchange caps, regulation, merchant pricing
G4 · Technology disruption — agentic commerce, cloud-native processors
G5 · New money forms — stablecoins, CBDCs, Visa's response
G6 · Risk & trust — fraud migration, AML, cybersecurity
H Visa strategy & future bets · 4 topics · Wks 17–18
H1 · Agentic commerce & AI — what Visa is building for AI-native payments
H2 · Stablecoins & crypto rails — Visa's positioning
H3 · Open banking & embedded finance — where Visa plays
H4 · Visa's 10-year strategic arc — network of networks thesis
35 topics · 35 sessions · ~12 weeks at 3x/week · one topic per day
